initiate_chat: A.initiate_chat("Plot a chart of META and TESLA stock price change YTD.", B)

AssistantAgent.system_message: You are a helpful AI assistant... In the following cases, suggest python code...

custom_reply: A.register_reply(B, reply_func_A2B) def reply_func_A2B(msg): output = input_from_human() if not output: if msg includes code: output = execute(msg) return output
